## Description

<!-- Tell us what this PR changes and why. Link the Issue if there is one. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check every box that applies. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update (README, CHANGELOG, comments, etc.)

## How Has This Been Tested

<!-- Describe the tests you ran. Include the Gradle commands and any manual QA. -->

- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] `./gradlew lint`
- [ ] Manual test on device or emulator: <!-- describe -->

## Checklist

<!-- Confirm each item. PRs without a complete checklist will be sent back for changes. -->

- [ ] My code follows the Kotlin official coding conventions.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code in non-obvious areas, especially around parser edge cases.
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation (README, CHANGELOG, or in-code comments).
- [ ] My changes generate no new Lint warnings.
- [ ] I have added or updated unit tests where it makes sense.
- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest` passes locally.
- [ ] `./gradlew lint` passes locally.
- [ ] Any user-visible strings live in `res/values/strings.xml` (and `values-en/` if applicable).

## Related Issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->
